chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::000
4-5.FL.2 Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::001
chunks.text: Goal 1: A goal you hope to accomplish this school year. Goal 2: A goal you hope to accomplish in your lifetime.

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::002
chunks.text: Turn your goals into a SMART Goal! For each of the goals you created in Part 1, brainstorm how to turn your goal into a SMART Goal. Go through each of the steps and transition your goal into a SMART Goal. Use the example below as a guideline. Example Goal: Read more books
